body:
boringkate:

When are they gonna add Retro Achievements to girls? I mean I guess they’re fun enough to kiss and bite and slap already, but it would be nice to have some kind of meta progression. I think if I bite her 1000 times then there should be a record of that. With a little icon. For motivation.
